creator: rodrigo@bebik.net
text:
Hi Pietro,

The error message looks pretty strange. The point is I didn't see it when I try the application  in my test environment.
I think this is not a serious threat (crash, blocking event) so we can, as you suggest, step forward from it. 

If you find any other problem with the application don't hesitate to email me, I will try to fix ASAP.

Best regards

Rodrigo OSORIO


On 08/07/08 00:32 +0200, Pietro Cerutti wrote:
> -----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
> Hash: SHA512
> 
> Hi Rodrigo,
> the port builds and installs fine. I'm able to start it and it creates
> the ~/.omegat directory, with its preferences files. All good.
> 
> However, at the first start (i.e., when the ~/.omegat directory does not
> yet exist) it prints this error on the console, before the GUI shows up:
> 
> 11250: ===================================================================
> 11250: OmegaT-1.7.3_2 (Tue Jul 08 00:29:13 CEST 2008)  Locale en_US
> 11250:

> 11250: org.omegat.filters2.TranslationException:
> 11250: Unexpected char 3 (7)!

> 11250: Tag name: xml

> org.omegat.util.xml.XMLStreamReader.getNextBlock(XMLStreamReader.java:156)

> org.omegat.util.xml.XMLStreamReader._setStream(XMLStreamReader.java:100)

> 11250:  at
> org.omegat.util.xml.XMLStreamReader.setStream(XMLStreamReader.java:65)

> 11250:
> 
> Should I worry about that? If it's ok I'm going to commit the port
> (after build tests on tinderboxes).
> 
> Cheers,
>
